mapper.insert:
insert into emp_experience(emp_id, start_date, end_date, company, job) values
(#{empId}, #{exp.start}, #{exp.end}, #{exp.company}, #{exp.job})
mapper.select: select id, emp_id, start_date, end_date, company, job from emp_experience where emp_id = #{empId} order by start_date desc, id desc
